title: Alyrion VII
description: This is the official Modpack for the Alyrion minecraft Server!
body:
# 🚀 Alyrion V 🚀

**Required Microsoft, Ely.by or Littleskin to function on the Official Server**

## GET READY! 
Season VII is the Greatest Alyrion of them all, it got:

**A custom Questline**

**A Steampunk Theme**

**Nation-Building**

**A custom Authentication System (Not offline Mode, but playable with a free Account)**

**And MUCH, MUCH more!**


## Our Community
Thank you, Alyrion. I love you so much :D

From 0 - 450+ in just over a year, the nicest community I ever met.

Thank you <3
